headline: Colgate Shareholder Vote Tests Board Diversity And Governance Confidence
summary: Shareholders of Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) are set to vote at the upcoming annual meeting on proposals addressing board diversity criteria and the role of the board chairman. One proposal seeks to remove diversity, equity, and inclusion considerations from director nominee selection, while another calls for an independent board chairman. Colgate-Palmolive has stated its opposition to both proposals and is actively soliciting shareholder votes against them. For a consumer products group...

headline: Gulf crude oil production down 57% from pre-war levels: Goldman
summary: Investing.com -- Gulf crude oil production has fallen by an estimated 14.5 million barrels per day, or 57%, from pre-war levels, according to Goldman Sachs, which warns that even after the Strait of Hormuz reopens, a full recovery could take significantly longer than markets expect.
